headline: Diamondback Energy Earnings Better Than Feared On Surprise Sales Gain
summary: Diamondback Energy gave positive guidance late Monday after beating earnings estimates for the first quarter.  Tidewater gave a mixed report, with Transocean also on deck.  Several oil stocks traded near highs on Monday as energy prices rose.

headline: Diamondback Energy (NASDAQ:FANG) Posts Better-Than-Expected Sales In Q1 CY2026
summary: Oil and gas producer Diamondback Energy (NASDAQ:FANG) beat Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 4.7% year on year to $4.24 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $4.23 per share was 12.8% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: How The Diamondback Energy (FANG) Narrative Is Shifting With New Oil Assumptions And Valuation Calls
summary: Analysts have lifted their fair value estimate for Diamondback Energy from US$179.03 to US$222.70, moving the modeled equity value range closer to where many current price targets sit. This reset lines up with recent research that relies on higher oil price assumptions, updated cash flow estimates, and a split between bullish and more cautious views on how much upside is left. Read on to see how these shifting targets, and the reasoning behind them, can help you track the evolving story...
